ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "stock_code" TEXT /* Stock code or ticker symbol */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company issuing the stock */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock exchange where the stock is listed */,
  "primary_stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the primary stock, if the stock is a class or series of a primary stock */,
  "sector" TEXT /* The sector the company belongs to */,
  "industry" TEXT /* The specific industry within the sector */,
  "currency" TEXT /* The currency in which the stock is traded */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* The market capitalization of the company */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* The timestamp of the last data update for the stock */,
  "is_listed" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the stock is currently listed on the exchange */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* The initial public offering date of the stock */,
  "ceo_name" TEXT /* The name of the CEO of the company */,
  "company_website" TEXT /* The website of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stocks_primary_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("primary_stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stocks_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES stock_exchanges ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock exchange */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the stock exchange */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the stock exchange */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* The time zone of the stock exchange */,
  "trading_hours_start" TEXT /* The start time of trading hours */,
  "trading_hours_end" TEXT /* The end time of trading hours */,
  "market_index" TEXT /* The primary market index associated with the exchange */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* The timestamp of the last data update for the exchange */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "price_date" TEXT /* Date of the price data */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock during the day */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock during the day */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume of the stock */,
  "change" REAL /* Change in price compared to the previous day */,
  "pre_market_price" REAL /* The pre-market price of the stock */,
  "after_market_price" REAL /* The after-market price of the stock */,
  "volume_weighted_average_price" REAL /* The volume-weighted average price (VWAP) of the stock */,
  "price_source" TEXT /* The source of the price data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* The timestamp of the last data update for the price */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., investor, trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* The phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* The address of the user */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* The date the user joined the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* The timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user's account is active */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* The timestamp of the last data update for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role and its permissions */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* A comma-separated list of permissions associated with the role */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* The timestamp of the last data update for the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download, trade) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* The IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* The user agent string of the device used for access */,
  "access_duration" TEXT /* The duration of the access event */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* The timestamp of the last data update for the access log */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news_articles" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the article is related to */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the news article */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the news article */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the news article */,
  "publish_date" TEXT /* Date the article was published */,
  "author" TEXT /* The author of the news article */,
  "summary" TEXT /* A summary of the news article */,
  "url" TEXT /* The URL to the full article */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* The timestamp of the last data update for the article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_articles_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economic_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economic indicator */,
  "indicator_name" TEXT /* Name of the economic indicator */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the economic indicator */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the indicator */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the indicator was recorded */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the indicator data */,
  "region" TEXT /* The region where the economic indicator is relevant */,
  "category" TEXT /* The category of the economic indicator */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* The timestamp of the last data update for the indicator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id")
)
